steps.html_instructions: Turn right toward Delaware Canal Towpath/D & L Trail
Turn right onto Delaware Canal Towpath/D & L Trail
Delaware Canal Towpath/D & L Trail turns slightly right and becomes Bristol Pike

Turn left onto Edgely Rd
Pass by 7-Eleven (on the right)
Turn right to stay on Delaware Canal Towpath/D&L Trl

Slight left onto Delaware Canal Towpath/D&L Trail
Continue to follow D&L Trail

Turn left onto PA-32 N/N Delmorr Ave
Continue to follow PA-32 N

Turn right onto General Washington Memorial Blvd
Entering New Jersey

Continue onto Washington Crossing Bridge/Washington Crossing Pennington Rd
Continue to follow Washington Crossing Pennington Rd
Turn left onto Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail

Keep right to stay on Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail
Passing through Pennsylvania
Entering New Jersey
Turn left to stay on Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail

Turn left to stay on Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail
Passing through Pennsylvania
Entering New Jersey

Turn left onto Frenchtown Rd/Milford Frenchtown Rd
Continue to follow Frenchtown Rd
Turn right onto D & L Trail - Lehigh Canal Towpath
Turn left to stay on D & L Trail - Lehigh Canal Towpath

routes.summary: Delaware and Raritan Canal State Park Trail
warnings: Bicycling directions are in beta. Use caution – This route may contain streets that aren't suited for bicycling.
